title: Juspay South Asia Partners is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Junior)

jsonLd.title: Juspay South Asia Partners is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
Juspay South Asia Partners is actively seeking a talented and motivated Credit Analyst to join our dynamic team in Raipur. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Juspay South Asia Partners:
Juspay South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in Python for Finance

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Raipur, Chhattisgarh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Juspay South Asia Partners!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
